headline: Crown Castle (CCI) Positioned for Long-Term Growth in Tower Leasing
summary: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) ranks among the best high profit margin stocks to buy. On March 5, Bernstein SocGen Group began coverage of Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) with an Outperform rating and a $102 price target. The firm forecasts revenue growth will rebound to the low single digits following recent low years, including a 2026 […]

headline: Is Crown Castle (CCI) Pricing Look Attractive After Weak Recent Share Performance?
summary: Wondering whether Crown Castle is attractively priced at its recent US$81.33 close, or if the market is signaling caution? This article walks through what the current valuation says about the stock. The share price performance has been weak recently, with returns of 7.1% over 7 days, 7.6% over 30 days, 8.3% year to date, 18.4% over 1 year, 24.7% over 3 years and 41.2% over 5 years. Recent coverage around Crown Castle has focused on its role as a U.S. communications infrastructure REIT and...
